title: Amsterdam, North Holland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Amsterdam, North Holland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Amsterdam is a city in North Holland with a population of 931,298. The cosmopolitan canal capital, blending historic charm with a world-class cultural scene and the country’s highest cost of living.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
